content: FASE 1: services/form_guard.py - analiza form_last_5, detecta streaks negativos, calcula form_score
FASE 2: analyst_engine - reforzar prompt con regla 'no recomendar side con racha negativa sin justificar' + guard post-LLM que penalice o reclasifique
FASE 3: football_competitions - constante BIG_FIVE_LEAGUES + helper is_big_five()
FASE 4: Backend - /api/analysis/run acepta live_only y big_five_only en AnalysisRunIn
FASE 5: Frontend LivePage - botón 'Analizar Big Five' + listado de picks live + reuso AnalysisProgressModal
FASE 7: Lint + screenshot + testing agent E2E
